title: Quarterly Newsletter
description:
Rather than sending a perfunctory weekly email to go unopened like all other boring newsletters, publish a quarterly zine with beautiful production value and in-depth features.

Open with a

by the CEO. Feature a MIDAO client in each issue with a fawning interview like it's a glossy magazine. Showcase MIDAO's latest public service to the islands with a photo spread.

Finish with a hyperlinked roundup of all MIDAO content since the last issue. Optional: offer print editions to all current MIDAO clients.

title: Cooking Show
description:
Instead of a dry, dime-a-dozen podcast format, have guests on to discuss MIDAO over a cooking challenge. Each episode, a Marshall Islander will submit a traditional recipe, and our onscreen team will attempt to recreate it.

For best results, film in NYC (lots of industry guests at hand) and have someone from the MI Permanent Mission judge the final result.

Performing an activity also engages the audience's mirror neurons in a way that podcasts do not.

title: Example: Community AMA
description:
Host a live Q&A session.
Collect questions in advance.
Record and repurpose clips for social.
